column1: Percy Spencer liked chocolate a lot. In the morning, before_________to work, he made sure he had a bar of chocolate with him to eat later on in the day. (GO)
When he got to work, he put on__________white coat and walked into the laboratory. He had no idea he was about to change the world forever. (HE)
It was 1945, and Percey___________important scientific experiments with radar. (DO)
Suddenly, when he put his hand in his pocket, he felt sticky, liquid chocolate. He realised that the radar_________the chocolate bar somehow. (MELT)
We'll never know exactly how Percy____________, but he was probably excited by what had happened and disappointed that he wouldn't be able to eat his bar of chocolate. (FEEL)
Percy's discovery soon____________to the invention of the microwave oven. (LEAD)
Percy built the___________oven, and then he and his colleagues tried it out to see if it worked. (ONE)
They cooked some popcorn, which cooked very quickly. They__________it was a big success. (THINK)
Then they tried cooking an egg, but it wasn't so successful. The egg exploded all over the face of one of the_________working with Percy! (MAN)
Have you heard of "blue zones"? These areas of the world in which people live the________ . (LONG)
In Sardinia, Italy, for example, an area of the island___________more males over 100 years of age than anywhere else on Earth today. (HAVE)
Another blue zone is Icaria, Greece. Many of its inhabitants live into_________90s. (THEY)
Visiting Costa Rica in 2007, the author and explorer Dan Buettner____________that a particular region in the country has an extremely long life expectancy. (FIND)
The Costa Ricans in this region, who are farmers, outlive men and ___________in other areas of the country. (WOMAN)
Scientists are still researching the reasons for blue zones, but it_____________that both diet and exercise play an important role. (SEEM)
They___________five blue zones so far. These include the three mentioned above, together with Okinawa, Japan, and Loma Linda, California. (DISCOVER)
Perhaps scientists___________more blue zones in other parts of the world in the future. (FIND)
